title: NUCLEAR HOLOCAUST
description: Global thermonuclear war has rendered the surface uninhabitable for 100 years. Radiation levels are lethal.

title: GLOBAL PANDEMIC
description: A super-virus with 99% mortality rate has swept the globe. Only those in sealed bunkers may survive.

title: ASTEROID IMPACT
description: A 10km asteroid has triggered an extinction event. The atmosphere is filled with dust and debris.

title: SOLAR SUPERSTORM
description: A massive solar flare has destroyed all electronics and irradiated the surface. UV levels are lethal.

title: CLIMATE COLLAPSE
description: Runaway greenhouse effect has boiled the oceans. Surface temperatures exceed 150°C.

title: AI UPRISING
description: Sentient AI has exterminated 99% of humanity. Survivors are hunted by autonomous drones.

title: ALIEN INVASION
description: Hostile extraterrestrials have conquered Earth. Human survivors are exterminated on sight.

title: DIMENSIONAL RIFT
description: Reality has fractured. The surface is now a chaotic mix of dimensions with hostile entities.

title: NANITE PLAGUE
description: Self-replicating nanobots consume all organic matter. The surface is being systematically disassembled.

title: VOLCANIC WINTER
description: Supervolcano eruption has blocked the sun. Global temperatures plummet to -50°C.

title: ZOMBIE OUTBREAK
description: A mutated prion disease causes reanimation of corpses. Infected hunt the living with relentless hunger.

title: GAMMA RAY BURST
description: A nearby star's death washed Earth in lethal radiation. The ozone layer is completely stripped away.

title: RESOURCE WARS
description: Global conflict over depleted resources has poisoned the biosphere with chemical and biological weapons.

title: TECHNOLOGICAL SINGULARITY
description: Runaway technological growth has made the surface unrecognizable. Reality itself seems to be rewriting.

title: CORDYCEPS PLAGUE
description: A mutated fungal infection hijacks nervous systems. Spores fill the air, infecting all who breathe them.

title: MAGNETIC POLE REVERSAL
description: Earth's magnetic field has collapsed. Cosmic radiation now bathes the surface unfiltered.

title: PRIMORDIAL BLACK HOLE
description: A microscopic black hole is orbiting Earth's core. Time dilation and gravitational anomalies make surface survival impossible.

title: ATMOSPHERIC TOXIFICATION
description: Industrial accidents released lethal gas mixtures. The air itself is now corrosive acid and poison.

title: INSECT MEGA-SWARM
description: Genetically modified locusts have multiplied beyond control. They devour everything organic in massive black clouds.

title: EXTENDED NUCLEAR WINTER
description: Massive nuclear exchange has triggered a decade-long winter. Temperatures remain below freezing globally.
